partner_info.name: PT Ajaib Futures Asia
partner_info.address: Soho @Podomoro City, Lt. 23 Unit 21, Jl. Letjen S. Parman Kav. 28, Tanjung Duren Selatan, Grogol Petamburan, Jakarta Barat, DKI Jakarta

parameter_a.notes: Evidence (docs): [Confidential] DANA Business Partner Due Diligence Checklist.pdf p.1 (Business Partner Name; NIB; business license). Evidence (docs): [Confidential] DANA Business Partner Due Diligence Checklist.pdf p.4 (Entity & Ownership; privately owned; principal owner name provided). Evidence (docs): [Confidential] DANA Business Partner Due Diligence Checklist.pdf p.4 (PEP question marked 'No'). Evidence (web): Bappebti list of Pialang Berjangka includes 'AJAIB FUTURES ASIA' with license number 002/BAPPEBTI/SI/09/2024 and address/phone (https://bappebti.go.id/pialang_berjangka/list_pialang, captured 2026-02-26 09:04:59 UTC; snapshot tmp/web-snapshots/20260226T090152Z/bappebti_list_pialang.json).

parameter_b.notes: Evidence (docs): [Confidential] DANA Business Partner Due Diligence Checklist.pdf p.2 (Financial ratios and audited financial statements marked 'No' / not provided; disclosure stated as subject to approval). Not evidenced: credit rating, audited financials, liquidity/leverage ratios, insurance coverage.

parameter_c.notes: Context (email): requested Risk Management review for a new initiative to integrate host-to-host with PT Ajaib Futures Asia for US Stocks products (source: Inputs/Re_ [Request Review] Due Diligence Form by Ajaib (Offshore Stock).eml, dated 2026-02-20). Not evidenced: documented business case/value proposition, shared objectives, or strategic fit assessment materials.

parameter_d.notes: Evidence (docs): [DANA] Struktur Organisasi PT Ajaib Futures Asia.pdf (organization structure includes operational, compliance, risk management, internal audit, IT, finance functions). Evidence (docs): [Confidential] DANA Business Partner Due Diligence Checklist.pdf p.2-3 (risk management function/policy; BCM policy; DR plan/center; fraud management function marked 'Yes'). Evidence (web): Bappebti lists AJAIB FUTURES ASIA as a licensed Pialang Berjangka (https://bappebti.go.id/pialang_berjangka/list_pialang, captured 2026-02-26 09:04:59 UTC). Inference: years_of_experience=4 based on establishment date in due diligence form (July 2021) through Feb 2026; treat as approximate. Not evidenced: ISO/quality certifications; documented project management methodology; innovation capability evidence.

parameter_e.regulatory_stand: Listed by Bappebti as a licensed Pialang Berjangka (license 002/BAPPEBTI/SI/09/2024) as of 2026-02-26.
parameter_e.notes: Evidence (docs): [Confidential] DANA Business Partner Due Diligence Checklist.pdf p.1 (Izin usaha pialang berjangka: 002/BAPPEBTI/SI/09/2024). Evidence (web): Bappebti list_pialang includes 'AJAIB FUTURES ASIA' with SIUP 002/BAPPEBTI/SI/09/2024 (https://bappebti.go.id/pialang_berjangka/list_pialang, captured 2026-02-26 09:04:59 UTC; snapshot tmp/web-snapshots/20260226T090152Z/bappebti_list_pialang.json). Evidence (docs): [Confidential] DANA Business Partner Due Diligence Checklist.pdf p.1 (no pending legal actions; no conflict of interest; no non-compliance indicated). Evidence (docs): [Confidential] DANA Business Partner Due Diligence Checklist.pdf p.8 (enforcement/investigation questions marked 'No'). Evidence (docs): [Confidential] DANA Business Partner Due Diligence Checklist.pdf p.5-8 (AML & CTF programme components marked 'Yes', including CDD/EDD, PEP screening, adverse information screening, SAR reporting, training). Evidence (web negative check): not found on Bappebti revoked-license list at capture time (https://bappebti.go.id/pialang_berjangka_cabut/list_pialang; snapshot tmp/web-snapshots/20260226T090152Z/bappebti_list_pialang_cabut.json). Not evidenced: independent sanctions screening of the partner by DANA (field sanctions_screened remains false).

parameter_f.notes: Not evidenced in provided docs: references, awards, independent reputation checks, adverse media screening results. Open item: perform documented adverse media + complaints review specific to PT Ajaib Futures Asia (and confirm relationship to other 'Ajaib' group entities before attributing reputational events).

parameter_g.notes: Evidence (docs): [Confidential] DANA Business Partner Due Diligence Checklist.pdf p.2-3 supports BCM/DR and fraud-management existence, but does not provide verifiable information security controls (ISO 27001/SOC 2, security testing cadence, encryption/access controls, breach history). Treat as gaps pending security due diligence artifacts.

parameter_h.notes: Not evidenced in provided materials: contract draft, liability/indemnity/exit clauses, governance and escalation arrangements for the proposed host-to-host integration.

general_notes: Partner assessment is based on one email thread and attached due diligence materials for PT Ajaib Futures Asia related to a proposed host-to-host integration for US Stocks products. Internal DANA identities from the email are intentionally redacted in outputs. Key limitations: financial ratios and audited financial statements were not provided (self-reported as confidential), and only partial SOP evidence is available (email indicates risk management SOP contents only). Unknown/unverifiable items are treated as gaps by design.
